extraction.one_line_summary: GAVIRIA Fernando solo bridged and won after CONTI Roberto crashed on a technical turn, out-sprinting chasers in finale
tactical_patterns: GC riders like LANDA Mikel attacked early on coastal rollers to gain 10-second bonuses despite modest stage profile.
LEON SANCHEZ Luis waited for breakaway companions on opening climb despite being strongest, preferring cooperation over solo effort.
GAVIRIA successfully bridged solo to break remnants after crash, suggesting Quick-Step prioritized stage hunting over pink jersey defense.

rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: positive: Bridged solo to break after technical crash, then had finishing speed to hold off VISCONTI—rare combo
rider_signals.CONTI Roberto: negative: Crashed on technical turn while competing for intermediate sprint bonuses, lost pink jersey opportunity
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: Initiated GC probing attacks on coastal rollers but was immediately reabsorbed, testing rivals early
rider_signals.LEON SANCHEZ Luis: neutral: Deliberately waited for breakaway companions despite being strongest on opening climb, prioritizing late ambush
